table.collateral_margin_report_lines physical_table collateral_margin_report_lines Produced collateral margin report line records at report-line grain, carrying the account, counterparty, collateral, valuation date, and eligible collateral value submitted for reporting. Produced collateral margin report line records at report-line grain, carrying the account, counterparty, collateral, valuation date, and eligible collateral value submitted for reporting. reporting.collateral_margin_report_lines
column.collateral_margin_report_lines.report_id column report_id Identifier of the generated collateral margin report submission.
column.collateral_margin_report_lines.line_number column line_number Line sequence number within a collateral margin report submission.
column.collateral_margin_report_lines.account_id column account_id Margin account identifier reported on the output line.
column.collateral_margin_report_lines.counterparty_id column counterparty_id Counterparty identifier reported on the output line.
column.collateral_margin_report_lines.collateral_id column collateral_id Collateral asset identifier reported on the output line.
column.collateral_margin_report_lines.valuation_date column valuation_date Valuation date used for the reported collateral amount.
column.collateral_margin_report_lines.eligible_collateral_value column eligible_collateral_value Reportable collateral value after applying haircut and eligibility calculation.

table.collateral_positions physical_table collateral_positions Collateral position records that describe pledged collateral assets assigned to margin accounts, including asset classification, currency, and issuer jurisdiction. Collateral position records that describe pledged collateral assets assigned to margin accounts, including asset classification, currency, and issuer jurisdiction. collateral_master.collateral_positions
column.collateral_positions.collateral_id column collateral_id Stable identifier for the pledged collateral asset position.
column.collateral_positions.account_id column account_id Margin account identifier to which the collateral position is assigned.
column.collateral_positions.asset_type column asset_type Asset classification of the pledged collateral used for eligibility assessment.
column.collateral_positions.currency column currency Denomination currency of the pledged collateral position.
column.collateral_positions.issuer_country column issuer_country Issuer jurisdiction of the pledged collateral asset when applicable for eligibility rules.

table.collateral_valuations physical_table collateral_valuations Daily collateral valuation records that capture market value and haircut inputs for pledged assets at valuation-date grain. Daily collateral valuation records that capture market value and haircut inputs for pledged assets at valuation-date grain. market_risk.collateral_valuations
column.collateral_valuations.valuation_id column valuation_id Stable identifier for a collateral valuation record.
column.collateral_valuations.collateral_id column collateral_id Identifier of the pledged collateral asset being valued.
column.collateral_valuations.valuation_date column valuation_date Business date on which the collateral market value and haircut are observed.
column.collateral_valuations.market_value_amount column market_value_amount Observed market value amount of the collateral before haircut adjustment.
column.collateral_valuations.haircut_rate column haircut_rate Haircut percentage applied to collateral market value for eligibility calculation.

table.counterparties physical_table counterparties Legal counterparty reference records used to identify reporting counterparties, domicile, and regulatory segmentation for collateral margin obligations. Legal counterparty reference records used to identify reporting counterparties, domicile, and regulatory segmentation for collateral margin obligations. margin_core.counterparties
column.counterparties.counterparty_id column counterparty_id Stable identifier for the legal counterparty reference record.
column.counterparties.legal_name column legal_name Registered legal name of the reporting counterparty.
column.counterparties.domicile_country column domicile_country Country or jurisdiction where the counterparty is domiciled for regulatory classification.
column.counterparties.regulatory_segment column regulatory_segment Regulatory counterparty segment used for reporting categorization and eligibility rules.

table.margin_accounts physical_table margin_accounts Margin account records that track collateralized account obligations, account status, base currency, and the linked counterparty used for margin reporting. Margin account records that track collateralized account obligations, account status, base currency, and the linked counterparty used for margin reporting. margin_core.margin_accounts
column.margin_accounts.account_id column account_id Stable identifier for a margin account record at account grain.
column.margin_accounts.counterparty_id column counterparty_id Identifier of the legal counterparty responsible for the margin account.
column.margin_accounts.base_currency column base_currency Currency in which the margin account obligation is primarily managed and reported.
column.margin_accounts.account_status column account_status Operational status of the margin account used to determine reporting eligibility.

requirement.item regulatory_requirement 合格抵质押品报送需求 监管/BRD要求每日生成保证金账户级合格抵质押品报表，用于说明每个保证金账户在估值日可计入监管口径的抵质押品资产、估值金额、监管折扣率和折扣后价值。需求还包括每日EOD生成、业务复核、异常估值说明和报表留痕；这些非数据类要求保留在本说明中，不强行建模为字段。
 监管/BRD要求每日生成保证金账户级合格抵质押品报表，用于说明每个保证金账户在估值日可计入监管口径的抵质押品资产、估值金额、监管折扣率和折扣后价值。需求还包括每日EOD生成、业务复核、异常估值说明和报表留痕；这些非数据类要求保留在本说明中，不强行建模为字段。
 Collateral Margin Reporting BRD v1.0 section 3.2
requirement_item..MarginAccount.has_AccountIdentifier requirement_semantic_item 保证金账户标识 需求需要保证金账户标识，用于确定每条报表记录归属的账户并支持账户级对账。 需求需要保证金账户标识，用于确定每条报表记录归属的账户并支持账户级对账。
requirement_item..Counterparty.has_CounterpartyIdentifier requirement_semantic_item 交易对手标识 需求需要交易对手标识，用于按法律实体或监管对象汇总抵质押品暴露。 需求需要交易对手标识，用于按法律实体或监管对象汇总抵质押品暴露。
requirement_item..CollateralAsset.has_CollateralIdentifier requirement_semantic_item 抵质押品标识 需求需要抵质押品标识，用于识别参与合格抵质押品计算的具体资产或头寸。 需求需要抵质押品标识，用于识别参与合格抵质押品计算的具体资产或头寸。
requirement_item..CollateralValuation.has_ValuationDate requirement_semantic_item 估值日期 需求需要估值日期，用于说明抵质押品价值和折扣率适用的报告日期。 需求需要估值日期，用于说明抵质押品价值和折扣率适用的报告日期。
requirement_item..CollateralValuation.has_MarketValueAmount requirement_semantic_item 抵质押品折扣前市场价值 需求需要抵质押品折扣前市场价值，用于作为合格抵质押品价值计算的基础金额。 需求需要抵质押品折扣前市场价值，用于作为合格抵质押品价值计算的基础金额。
requirement_item..CollateralValuation.has_HaircutRate requirement_semantic_item 监管折扣率 需求需要监管折扣率，用于从市场价值计算监管口径下可计入的合格抵质押品价值。 需求需要监管折扣率，用于从市场价值计算监管口径下可计入的合格抵质押品价值。
requirement_item..CollateralValuation.has_EligibleCollateralValue requirement_semantic_item 折扣后合格抵质押品价值 需求需要折扣后合格抵质押品价值，用于展示监管口径下可计入的抵质押品金额。
report_impl.item report_implementation 每日合格抵质押品报表数据逻辑 说明每日合格抵质押品报表字段如何从已有保证金账户、交易对手、抵质押品和估值数据中取数、计算并满足需求口径；该逻辑不创建物理表。 说明每日合格抵质押品报表字段如何从已有保证金账户、交易对手、抵质押品和估值数据中取数、计算并满足需求口径；该逻辑不创建物理表。
implementation_field.collateral_margin_report_lines.account_id implementation_field_binding 保证金账户标识逻辑 数据逻辑说明保证金账户标识需求如何对应报表明细字段 account_id。 数据逻辑说明保证金账户标识需求如何对应报表明细字段 account_id。
implementation_field.collateral_margin_report_lines.counterparty_id implementation_field_binding 交易对手标识逻辑 数据逻辑说明交易对手标识需求如何对应报表明细字段 counterparty_id。 数据逻辑说明交易对手标识需求如何对应报表明细字段 counterparty_id。
implementation_field.collateral_margin_report_lines.collateral_id implementation_field_binding 抵质押品标识逻辑 数据逻辑说明抵质押品标识需求如何对应报表明细字段 collateral_id。 数据逻辑说明抵质押品标识需求如何对应报表明细字段 collateral_id。
implementation_field.collateral_margin_report_lines.valuation_date implementation_field_binding 估值日期逻辑 数据逻辑说明估值日期需求如何对应报表明细字段 valuation_date。 数据逻辑说明估值日期需求如何对应报表明细字段 valuation_date。

implementation_field.collateral_valuations.market_value_amount implementation_field_binding 抵质押品折扣前市场价值逻辑 数据逻辑说明抵质押品折扣前市场价值需求如何对应估值数据字段 market_value_amount。 数据逻辑说明抵质押品折扣前市场价值需求如何对应估值数据字段 market_value_amount。
implementation_field.collateral_valuations.haircut_rate implementation_field_binding 监管折扣率逻辑 数据逻辑说明监管折扣率需求如何对应估值数据字段 haircut_rate。 数据逻辑说明监管折扣率需求如何对应估值数据字段 haircut_rate。

implementation_field.collateral_margin_report_lines.eligible_collateral_value implementation_field_binding 折扣后合格抵质押品价值逻辑 数据逻辑说明折扣后合格抵质押品价值需求如何由市场价值和监管折扣率计算并对应报表明细字段 eligible_collateral_value。 数据逻辑说明折扣后合格抵质押品价值需求如何由市场价值和监管折扣率计算并对应报表明细字段 eligible_collateral_value。
